best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-firebasesdk-002 title: event listener for missions - failed response module: firebase sdk source pages: 5 preconditions: a listener is added for mission events. test data: - mission: id=1, titolo="first mission", superato=false test steps: 1. add a value event listener for mission events. 2. simulate a failure in the realtime database processing. 3. wait for the realtime database to trigger the event. 4. receive the response from the realtime database. 5. check if the response indicates an error. expected result: the response should indicate an error in the processing of the mission event. note: these test cases cover all the described elements and flows across the provided uml diagrams. edge cases and negative scenarios have been included where applicable. <|assistant|>

item_text: the realtime database checks a token and collects the requested data.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-realtimedatabase-002 title: asynchronous data handling - failed response module: realtime database source pages: 4 preconditions: a hashmap is sent to the realtime database. test data: - hashmap: {"key": "value"} test steps: 1. send the hashmap to the realtime database. 2. wait for the realtime database to convert it to json. 3. simulate a failure in the realtime database processing. 4. receive the response from the realtime database. 5. check if the response indicates an error. expected result: the response should indicate an error in the processing of the hashmap.

item_text: finally, the firebase sdk sends the collected data back to the main application.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-firebasesdk-002 title: event listener for missions - failed response module: firebase sdk source pages: 5 preconditions: a listener is added for mission events. test data: - mission: id=1, titolo="first mission", superato=false test steps: 1. add a value event listener for mission events. 2. simulate a failure in the realtime database processing. 3. wait for the realtime database to trigger the event. 4. receive the response from the realtime database. 5. check if the response indicates an error. expected result: the response should indicate an error in the processing of the mission event. note: these test cases cover all the described elements and flows across the provided uml diagrams. edge cases and negative scenarios have been included where applicable. <|assistant|>

test case id: tc-ranking-001 title: user completes a ranking module: ranking source pages: 1 preconditions: a user is logged in and a ranking exists. test data: - user: example@example.com - ranking: id=1, titolo="first ranking", superato=false test steps: 1. log in as the user. 2. complete the ranking. 3. check if the ranking is marked as superato. expected result: the ranking should be marked as superato for the user.
